response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/s in DLang), plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-team platform ownership at IC6 scope make this a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe growth/experimentation depth.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering across TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java, Python-adjacent stacks
Proven high-scale, low-latency systems work (Sociomantic micro-services, millions of HTTP req/s)
Active AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience aligns with AI-first mandate
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
No explicit telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis track record
Title and scope (Senior/Staff) below Principal/IC6 cross-org platform leadership bar
